channel.title: GNfinance
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from GNfinance, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: SEC fears short-term thinking, but Tesla and Amazon prove long game
item.description: Semiannual earnings reporting aims to fix a problem that market successes have already solved.

item.title: Morgan Stanley: Pullbacks will be shallow as risks diminish
item.description: Earnings, capex and AI adoption reduce opportunities to buy into geopolitically driven weakness.

item.title: Verizon stock rises on surprise subscriber growth
item.description: Earnings per share topped expectations; revenue fell short.

item.title: New version of old drug helps men regrow hair
item.description: A safer formulation of a popular hair-loss treatment showed robust growth in clinical trial.
